MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-585618 WITH CASE CGC-21-590044
Off Calendar Dec-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MARTHA ZARATE'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-20-585618 WITH CASE NO. CGC-21-590044.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. No opposition filed. Action Nos. CGC-21-590044 and CGC-20-585618 are consolidated for all purposes. The instant action (No. CGC-21-590044) shall be the lead action, and all further pleadings shall be filed under this case number.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
